description: Our World in Data full COVID-19 dataset (cases, deaths, vaccinations by country/date)
source: Our World in Data (verified static CSV)
skip_reason: Country-level daily COVID time series with aggregated counts (total_cases, new_deaths, etc.) per country per day. No individual-level binary outcome, no treatment/exposure grouping, no stratum variable — purely ecological/geographic time series data that cannot be disaggregated into Successes/Cases cells.
